Class Budget

java.lang.Object
com.fakkaflow.data.model.Budget
public class Budget extends Object
Represents a budget for a specific category for a user. This model is used to track spending limits and usage within a given period.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Budget()
    Default constructor.
    Budget(int userId, int categoryId, float amountLimit, String period)
    Creates a new budget with basic details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Budget

      public Budget()
      Default constructor.

    • Budget

      public Budget(int userId, int categoryId, float amountLimit, String period)
      Creates a new budget with basic details.
      Parameters:
      userId - ID of the user
      categoryId - ID of the category
      amountLimit - maximum allowed amount
      period - budget period (e.g., monthly)

    • getUsagePercent

      public double getUsagePercent()
      Calculates the percentage of the budget that has been used.
      Returns:
      usage percentage (0–100)
